description: Fixed broken operation references in tasks domain: added wrapper functions for relates.find, label.list, label.show to task-engine.ts, updated TasksHandler to use them, and updated history to support taskId parameter for audit logs.

Fixed broken operation references in memory domain: Created memory-engine.ts re-exporting core functions. Updated lib/engine.ts to export all memory operations including contradictions, superseded, and graph operations. Updated MemoryHandler to use lib/engine.ts. Fixed sessionContextInject reference in lib/engine.ts.
Fixed broken operation references in session domain
details: Refactored session.context.inject to adhere to engine-core architecture. Created sessionContextInject in session-engine.ts wrapping core logic. Updated domain handler and orchestrate engine to use the engine function.
